_meta.purpose: NAIC homeowners multiple-peril market share, used as the cross-carrier weight for F-bar(state) in apply_home_filings.py WHEN per-filing SERFF written_premium is unavailable (home twin of market_share.json). CA (CDI Excel) + TX (data.texas.gov) home filings carry no written premium, so without a weight F-bar collapses to an equal-weighted mean (a 6% Liberty book == a 2% Chubb book). Market share supplies the correct economic weight where the filing premium is missing.
_meta.source: NAIC 2024 Market Share Report, Homeowners Multiple Peril, top-25 groups by direct premiums written — via Agency Checklists (2025-03-17) and NAIC/S&P Global cross-check.
_meta.keyed_by: HOME_CARRIERS roster name (home/index.html). Groups not in the roster (Citizens, Universal, Tokio Marine, Munich Re, Florida Peninsula) are omitted; roster carriers below the top-25 (Kemper, Safeco within Liberty group, Westfield, Shelter, NJM, farm bureaus, Allied Trust) fall to the de-minimis floor.
_meta.notes: Safeco is inside the Liberty Mutual group in NAIC data — the group's 6.14% is attributed to Liberty Mutual; Safeco falls to the floor. The two AAA/Auto Club entries map: Auto Club Enterprises -> 'Auto Club Group (AAA)', CSAA Insurance Group -> 'CSAA / AAA'.
